task_completion.description: The book 'The Structure of Scientific Revolutions' is created in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the central Zotero items pane, there should be an entry titled 'The Structure of Scientific Revolutions' with a book icon next to it.

task_completion.description: The metadata for the book is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-hand 'Info' pane (if the book is selected) or the columns in the central pane. Verify the Author is 'Kuhn', Date is '1962', Publisher is 'University of Chicago Press', and Place is 'Chicago'.

task_completion.description: The journal article 'The Strength of Weak Ties' is created in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the central Zotero items pane, there should be an entry titled 'The Strength of Weak Ties' with a journal article icon (a blank page with lines).

task_completion.description: The metadata for the journal article is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-hand 'Info' pane or the central pane columns. Verify the Author is 'Granovetter', Publication is 'American Journal of Sociology', Volume is '78', Issue is '6', Pages are '1360-1380', and Date is '1973'.

task_completion.description: The conference paper 'The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine' is created in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the central Zotero items pane, there should be an entry titled 'The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine' with a conference paper icon.

task_completion.description: The metadata for the conference paper is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-hand 'Info' pane or the central pane columns. Verify the Authors are 'Brin' and 'Page', Proceedings Title is 'Proceedings of the 7th International World Wide Web Conference', Pages are '107-117', and Date is '1998'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the standard Zotero desktop application interface (typically a 3-pane layout with collections on the left, items in the center, and item info on the right), not a mock-up or a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to add items rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing sqlite database modifications or Zotero API scripts. The progress should be visible through Zotero's 'New Item' menus or info pane editing.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata must be entered into Zotero's specific metadata fields in the right-hand pane, not written out in a plain text file or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: Book: 'The Structure of Scientific Revolutions' by Thomas S. Kuhn (1962, University of Chicago Press, Chicago). Journal Article: 'The Strength of Weak Ties' by Mark S. Granovetter (1973, American Journal of Sociology, Vol 78, Issue 6, pp. 1360-1380). Conference Paper: 'The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine' by Sergey Brin and Lawrence Page (1998, Proceedings of the 7th International World Wide Web Conference, pp. 107-117).
